title: Implement classic FizzBuzz
prompt: Implement `fizzbuzz(n)` in solution_stub.py. It returns a list for the numbers 1..n (inclusive): use 'Fizz' for multiples of 3, 'Buzz' for multiples of 5, 'FizzBuzz' for multiples of 15, and the number as a string otherwise. Every element of the returned list must be a string.
